auth.reauthenticate: Sign in again before deleting your account.

profile.deleteConfirmCopy: Your profile, uploads, playlists, likes, comments and sign-in data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

profile.deleteFinalCopy: Do you want to permanently delete your Yoriax account now?
profile.emailHint: The email address cannot currently be changed.
profile.favoriteGenresCopy: Adjust the selection for Home and your For You feed at any time.
profile.notConnectedCopy: Your profile cannot be saved because the app is currently disconnected.
